evidence_summary: Establish the scale of Zodanga's fortifications to dwarf the characters and facilitate a moment of emotional sacrifice where Carter separates from Woola to maintain undercover status.
Carter reaches the massive walls of Zodanga. To maintain his undercover status and avoid drawing attention to his unusual companion, he makes the difficult decision to leave Woola behind.
Carter and Woola arrive at the approach to the city gates.
Carter moves toward the gates alone; Woola remains behind.
Carter decides to abandon his companion to ensure successful undercover entry.
